name: Dairy Beef Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the ground beef in the butter.
2. Add the onions and garlic to the beef mixture.
3. Stir in the tomato sauce, salt, and pepper.
4. Combine the sour cream, cottage cheese, and carrots.
5. Mix the meat mixture with the noodles and the combined dairy ingredients.
6. Alternate layers of the meat mixture and noodle mixture in a 3-quart casserole dish, beginning and ending with the noodle mixture.
7. Top with cheddar cheese.
8. Bake at 350 degrees F for at least 45 minutes and serve hot.
